steps.title: Set up the total cost
steps.content:
Let $m$ be the number of months. The total charge is the $38$ dollar enrollment fee plus $18$ dollars per month.
$$38+18m=182$$

steps.title: Solve for months
steps.content:
Subtract $38$, then divide by $18$.
$$18m=182-38=144$$
$$m=\frac{144}{18}=8$$
The answer is 8.
